title: Galician-Style Pork with Spicy Massaman Sauce
description: A twist on traditional Galician cuisine, this recipe combines the flavors of pork, Massaman curry paste, and spicy undertones.
instructions: 2. Season pork shoulder with salt and pepper.
3. Heat tra in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
4. Sear pork shoulder until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
5. Remove pork from pot and set aside.
6. Add onion and garlic to pot and cook until softened.
7. Stir in spicy Massaman curry paste and cook for 1 minute.
8. Add potatoes, white wine, and browned pork back to pot.
9. Cover pot and transfer to preheated oven.
10. Braise for 2 1/2 hours or until pork is tender.
11. Serve with galician salmorejo, if desired.
